title: RandomControl
description: Liberate your server from the RNG loving bourgeoisie! Paper plugin to enable entity based RNG manipulation.
body:
# RandomControl - Enable RNG Manipulation on Paper servers

Lets you manipulate RNG on Paper (and forks). No config, straightforward plugin.

Designed for use and tested with Earthcomputer's enchantment manipulator. However, should work with anything else abusing entity RNG.

**Does not currently work with fishing manipulation (`/cfish`)**
